criteria_verification.evidence: Added the function with signature `def load_stub_registry(path: Path) -> list[CapabilityDescriptor]:` to src/jarvis/tools/capabilities.py and exported it via __all__. TestAC001LoaderSignature asserts the function is exported, in __all__, and has a single `path: Path` parameter (annotation may be the class or the string under `from __future__ import annotations`).
criteria_verification.notes: Added the function with signature `def load_stub_registry(path: Path) -> list[CapabilityDescriptor]:` to src/jarvis/tools/capabilities.py and exported it via __all__. TestAC001LoaderSignature asserts the function is exported, in __all__, and has a single `path: Path` parameter (annotation may be the class or the string under `from __future__ import annotations`).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Loads YAML at `path`; validates every entry against `CapabilityDescriptor`; returns list preserving YAML order.
criteria_verification.evidence: Loader opens path with utf-8 encoding, parses with yaml.safe_load, then constructs each entry via CapabilityDescriptor.model_validate. The list is built with a comprehension that preserves PyYAML's source order. TestAC002LoadAndValidate covers: returns a list of CapabilityDescriptor, preserves a deliberately scrambled order [zebra, apple, mango, banana], round-trips the canonical Phase 2 stub file (architect-agent, product-owner-agent, ideation-agent, forge), nested CapabilityToolSummary coercion, and empty-list handling.
criteria_verification.notes: Loader opens path with utf-8 encoding, parses with yaml.safe_load, then constructs each entry via CapabilityDescriptor.model_validate. The list is built with a comprehension that preserves PyYAML's source order. TestAC002LoadAndValidate covers: returns a list of CapabilityDescriptor, preserves a deliberately scrambled order [zebra, apple, mango, banana], round-trips the canonical Phase 2 stub file (architect-agent, product-owner-agent, ideation-agent, forge), nested CapabilityToolSummary coercion, and empty-list handling.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Raises `FileNotFoundError` if `path` does not exist (startup-fatal per design §7).
criteria_verification.evidence: Loader checks `if not path.exists()` first and raises FileNotFoundError with a message containing the path and a `startup-fatal per FEAT-JARVIS-002 design §7` reference. TestAC003MissingFileRaises verifies both that FileNotFoundError is raised on a nonexistent path and that the path is included in the error message.
criteria_verification.notes: Loader checks `if not path.exists()` first and raises FileNotFoundError with a message containing the path and a `startup-fatal per FEAT-JARVIS-002 design §7` reference. TestAC003MissingFileRaises verifies both that FileNotFoundError is raised on a nonexistent path and that the path is included in the error message.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Raises `pydantic.ValidationError` if any descriptor is malformed (e.g. uppercase `agent_id`).
criteria_verification.evidence: Loader uses CapabilityDescriptor.model_validate(entry) per entry — pydantic surfaces ValidationError directly on any failure. TestAC004MalformedEntryRaisesValidationError covers four failure modes: uppercase agent_id ('Architect'), missing required field (no description), unknown risk_level ('catastrophic'), and invalid trust_tier ('rogue'). All raise pydantic.ValidationError.
criteria_verification.notes: Loader uses CapabilityDescriptor.model_validate(entry) per entry — pydantic surfaces ValidationError directly on any failure. TestAC004MalformedEntryRaisesValidationError covers four failure modes: uppercase agent_id ('Architect'), missing required field (no description), unknown risk_level ('catastrophic'), and invalid trust_tier ('rogue'). All raise pydantic.ValidationError.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Rejects duplicate `agent_id` entries with a ValueError mentioning the duplicated id.
criteria_verification.evidence: After all descriptors are validated, the loader iterates with a `seen: set[str]` and raises `ValueError(f"Duplicate agent_id {descriptor.agent_id!r} in stub capability registry at {path!s}.")` on the first repeat. TestAC005DuplicateAgentIdRejected verifies (a) consecutive duplicates raise ValueError with 'twin' in the message, (b) a duplicate split across the middle of the list still triggers a ValueError matching 'first', and (c) malformed entries still raise ValidationError rather than ValueError.
criteria_verification.notes: After all descriptors are validated, the loader iterates with a `seen: set[str]` and raises `ValueError(f"Duplicate agent_id {descriptor.agent_id!r} in stub capability registry at {path!s}.")` on the first repeat. TestAC005DuplicateAgentIdRejected verifies (a) consecutive duplicates raise ValueError with 'twin' in the message, (b) a duplicate split across the middle of the list still triggers a ValueError matching 'first', and (c) malformed entries still raise ValidationError rather than ValueError.

criteria_verification.evidence: Loader calls `yaml.safe_load(handle)` exactly once with an inline comment citing DM-stub-registry §Schema. TestAC006UsesSafeLoad verifies (a) yaml.safe_load is invoked once via a wraps-spy, and (b) a static grep over the module source asserts `yaml.load(` (with open paren) does not appear anywhere in capabilities.py.
